next_action: CR140 Phase 2 completed with full pytest matching Phase 0 failure set. Enter Phase 3: freeze old turnover output on synthetic fixture/injection layer, cut adapter to engine implementation, and compare golden fixture. Do not link or read real lake without separate authorization.

open_risks.summary: CP7 did not scan or mutate the real lake. The generated plan requires a no-write inventory dry-run before any write gate.
Active catalog was refreshed, PIT blockers were resolved, and Gate D published pointer advance passed post-pointer smoke. Provider catalog/NAS/cleanup remain separate gates.
Physical partition migration remains unauthorized and requires backup/checksum/rollback proof.
Local root was renamed to /home/hyde/data/quant-lab/data-lake and Gate A was re-run on the aligned root.
48,899,668 duplicate keys have approved default quarantine/dedup decision boundaries, but affected datasets still require per-dataset full-row profile and explicit write authorization.

Batch 0 shows events duplicate primary keys under (symbol,event_type,event_date,available_at); approved plan uses quarantine readiness rows 351,527, but events write still requires full-row profile and explicit dataset authorization.
No external write fence has been mechanically proven. Any real Gate B write batch requires fenced/quiescent window plus Gate A rerun, or explicit drift risk acceptance.
17/17 active catalog records now carry lineage checksums; Gate C-2 and Gate C-2D manifest/catalog evidence has been written and verified.
Gate E-1 copied 17 main objects to CR139 canonical targets and Gate C-2 refreshed active catalog to those targets; legacy/candidate cleanup remains separately gated.

Remaining Batch 2 split planning found business-conflict buckets in prices, prices_limit, events, and trade_status; these datasets require explicit per-dataset quarantine or semantic-resolution decisions before write.
